rationale: Law 2 (Energy Adaptation) is missing from 4/5 products. This violates ECOSYSTEM-CONSTITUTION.md Part 1, creating cross-product inconsistency. MindShift has it; others simulate compliance without implementation. Code-index is current, swarm confirms priority. Fixing this aligns all products with the Constitution and closes P0 ecosystem debt.
risk_if_other_side_wins: Allowing Law 2 non-compliance entrenches technical and ethical drift. Users in VOLAURA, LifeSim, BrandedBy, and ZEUS are denied energy-state-aware experiences. Prolongs simulation without adaptation — a core failure of the ecosystem's promise.
constitutional_violations_detected: LAW 2: Energy Adaptation not implemented in VOLAURA, Life Simulator, BrandedBy, Atlas
